items.title: Why Wall Street thinks US memory maker Micron is the next Nvidia
items.summary: Eager to find more public AI-related companies that may do as well as Nvidia, Wall Street investors think they've found a winner with Micron.
items.titleZh: 为什么华尔街认为美国内存制造商美光是下一个英伟达
items.summaryZh: 华尔街投资者渴望找到更多可能与英伟达一样表现良好的公共人工智能相关公司，他们认为他们已经找到了美光的赢家。

items.title: The Future Cyberpunk Imagined Is Here: How Much Did It Get Right?
items.summary: From AI to brain implants, cyberpunk got more right than many people realize. Its biggest prediction, however, wasn't the technology.
items.titleZh: 想象中的未来赛博朋克就在这里：它在多大程度上是正确的？
items.summaryZh: 从人工智能到大脑植入，赛博朋克比许多人意识到的要正确得多。然而，它最大的预测不是技术。

items.title: What the New AC Culture War Is Really About
items.summary: Underneath the debates raging online is a fundamental divide about how America and Europe address discomfort.
items.titleZh: 新AC文化战争到底是什么
items.summaryZh: 在网上激烈争论的背后，是关于美国和欧洲如何解决不适的根本分歧。

items.title: Google is rationing Gemini access to Meta because it cannot provide enough compute
items.summary: Google has placed limits on Meta’s use of its Gemini AI models because it cannot provide as much computing capacity as the social media company wanted, the Financial Times reported on Sunday. The restrictions have affected several Google clients, with Meta hi…
items.titleZh: 谷歌正在限制Gemini访问Meta，因为它无法提供足够的计算能力
items.summaryZh: 据英国《金融时报》周日报道，谷歌已限制Meta使用其Gemini人工智能模型，因为它无法提供这家社交媒体公司想要的那么多计算能力。这些限制已经影响了几家谷歌客户，Meta…

items.title: I left Google after making nearly $1M in a year. Fears about layoffs and missing out on the AI boom gave me the push.
items.summary: A former Google employee says AI equity, job security concerns, and years of side projects convinced him to leave and build his own company.
items.titleZh: 我在一年赚了近100万美元后离开了谷歌。对裁员和错过人工智能热潮的担忧给了我动力。
items.summaryZh: 一名前谷歌员工表示，人工智能股权、工作保障问题和多年的副项目说服他离开并建立自己的公司。

items.title: Use Android Auto? How to limit what information Gemini learns about you
items.summary: Google's AI offers a lot of convenience in your car, but you're offering up a lot of sensitive information.
items.titleZh: 使用安卓汽车？如何限制双子座对你的了解
items.summaryZh: 谷歌的人工智能在你的车上提供了很多便利，但你提供了很多敏感信息。

items.title: I landed a Big Tech AI job. Treating my career like a science lab helped me overcome my fear of learning AI.
items.summary: A product designer share how embracing her inner "mad scientist" and experimenting with AI helped her land a job at Adobe, with no formal background in machine learning.
items.titleZh: 我找到了一份大型科技公司的人工智能工作。将我的职业生涯视为科学实验室，帮助我克服了学习人工智能的恐惧。
items.summaryZh: 一位产品设计师分享了她如何拥抱内心的“疯狂科学家”并尝试人工智能，帮助她在没有正式机器学习背景的情况下在Adobe找到了一份工作。

items.title: The AI talent perk money can't buy
items.summary: Everyone can pay AI engineers millions. The winners offer freedom, says Jason Lemkin, the "Godfather of Saas."
items.titleZh: 金钱买不到的人工智能人才福利
items.summaryZh: 每个人都可以向人工智能工程师支付数百万美元。“萨斯教父”杰森·莱姆金说，获胜者提供了自由

items.title: Slate is betting Americans want less car for less money
items.summary: Slate unveiled the starting price for its tiny, electric pickup truck this week. It's betting that today's overly techy cars created a white space.
items.titleZh: Slate打赌美国人想要更少的车，更少的钱
items.summaryZh: Slate本周公布了其小型电动皮卡的起价。它打赌今天的技术含量过高的汽车创造了一个空白区域。

items.title: GM wants to crack self-driving for the masses, and it's hiring talent from rivals to do it
items.summary: GM has made several key executive hires since 2025 and brought back Cruise alums to ramp up its self-driving tech development in personal cars.
items.titleZh: 通用汽车希望为大众破解自动驾驶技术，并正在从竞争对手那里招聘人才来实现这一目标
items.summaryZh: 自2025年以来，通用汽车已经招聘了几名关键高管，并带回了Cruise的校友，以加强其在个人汽车领域的自动驾驶技术开发。

items.title: The hottest new real estate marketing tactic: accepting IPO stock
items.summary: Luxury home sellers are offering startup stock trades to attract tech investors in a slow market, marketing homes to AI employees and investors.
items.titleZh: 最热门的房地产营销新策略：接受IPO股票
items.summaryZh: 豪宅卖家正在提供创业股票交易，以在缓慢的市场中吸引科技投资者，向人工智能员工和投资者推销房屋。

items.title: The retired college professor fighting a $313 trespassing ticket in Wisconsin thinks he’s part of a national struggle
items.summary: Paul Florsheim just wanted to walk his beach. The retired professor thinks his $313 trespassing ticket is like the fight against Elon Musk.
items.titleZh: 这位退休的大学教授在威斯康星州与一张313美元的非法侵入罚单作斗争，他认为自己是全国斗争的一部分
items.summaryZh: Paul Florsheim只是想在海滩上散步。这位退休教授认为，他313美元的非法侵入门票就像是与埃隆·马斯克的斗争。
